data.title: Bessent Defends Trump's Iran War Move Saying US Economy Was In 'Good Shape'— But Warns Growth May Be Slower This Quarter
data.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent expressed concerns about potential economic slowdown in the current quarter, hinting that the growth rate might be lower than before due to the U.S.-Iran conflict. Bessent, in an interview with CNBC's Sara Eisen, highlighted the strong state of the economy prior to the conflict and mentioned that favorable economic indicators influenced President Donald Trump's decision to engage in war. Drawing insights from "micro data points" gathered from companies and banks, Bessent avoided making precise GDP predictions but referred to comments made by JP Morgan Chase (NYSE: JPM) CEO Jamie Dimon on consumer credit and corporate earnings as positive signals indicating stability among consumers and businesses. Bessent emphasized that any GDP forecast would depend on the duration of the conflict, which remains uncertain, stating "I don't know whether it's three days or three weeks."

data.title: Guidewire Launches ProNavigator, Embedding Expert AI Insights into Insurance Workflows
data.description: Guidewire, headquartered in San Mateo, California, has introduced Guidewire ProNavigator, an artificial intelligence (AI) assistant integrated into its primary software applications, InsuranceSuite and InsuranceNow.

data.title: Waste-to-Energy Market Size to Reach USD 56.0 Billion by 2032, Growing at 4.7% CAGR | Allied Market Research
data.description: The global waste-to-energy market is experiencing significant growth driven by a surge in demand for renewable energy, stricter environmental regulations, and advancements in technology. A report by Allied Market Research highlights that the market size is expanding rapidly. This growth is attributed to various factors such as the increasing focus on sustainability and the need to reduce carbon emissions. The report forecasts a substantial increase in the market size, reflecting the rising demand for alternative energy sources. This trend is particularly evident in industries looking to adopt greener practices and comply with environmental standards. The waste-to-energy sector is poised for further expansion as more countries invest in sustainable solutions.

data.title: Starlight Investments Marks Major Milestone with Completion of First Phase of New Build-to-Rent Community at The Waypoint in Maidenhead
data.description: A riverside rental community consisting of 255 homes in the London Commuter Belt is currently being developed in Maidenhead, United Kingdom. On April 16, 2026, Starlight Investments, a prominent real estate investment and asset management company, revealed the successful completion and unveiling of the initial phase of the project.

data.title: Retirement Security in the United States Is Stuck in the Doldrums
data.description: A recent study revealed that only 59% of individuals in the United States feel they have saved or are in the process of saving an adequate amount for retirement. The research, conducted in Los Angeles and published on April 16, 2026, suggests that Americans are experiencing limited progress in their financial preparedness, potentially due to economic instability.

data.title: spektr Raises $20M Series A to Eliminate Manual Compliance Work Across Financial Services
data.description: Copenhagen's spektr, a company specializing in AI infrastructure for financial services compliance, has successfully secured $20 million in Series A funding. The investment was headed by NEA, with support from current investors such as Northzone, Seedcamp, and PSV Tech. The influx of funds will fuel the expansion of spektr's AI platform and drive its implementation in financial institutions worldwide. Presently, compliance teams dedicate substantial time to scrutinizing regulatory documents, but spektr aims to revolutionize this process through automation and efficiency.

data.title: 83% of UK CFOs Say Spend Management Is More Manual Than It Should Be
data.description: A recent study conducted by Corpay in London revealed that a significant number of organizations still depend on manual or semi-manual spend procedures. This research sheds light on the fact that despite advancements in technology, many businesses have not fully automated their spending processes.

data.title: More than one-third of organizations struggle to meet climate targets as AI adds pressure
data.description: In Amsterdam, a recent study by management consultancy BearingPoint reveals that sustainability is a crucial aspect of corporate strategy across various industries. The study shows that almost all surveyed organizations have either adopted or are planning to adopt science-based climate targets, with over one-third facing setbacks in meeting these goals. The report titled “Achieving en" underscores the widespread commitment to environmental objectives, yet the challenge lies in translating these aspirations into tangible environmental advancements.

data.title: Smartsheet Research Reveals Traditional Thinking on Metrics is Holding AI Adoption Back
data.description: In London, a recent research report by Smartsheet highlighted a concerning trend in UK business productivity. Despite 80% of leaders acknowledging that AI technologies are enhancing productivity, there exists a significant disparity in how productivity is measured. The report revealed that the majority of businesses still evaluate productivity based on hours worked and tasks completed. Consequently, teams often engage in busy work to fill their available time, neglecting strategic activities that stimulate revenue growth and propel the business towards progress. This indicates a crucial disconnect in the current approach to gauging productivity, potentially hindering overall business success.

data.title: InCoax wins initial US deployment order with Underline
data.description: In Lund, Sweden, on April 16, 2026, InCoax Networks AB announced a new partnership with CTIconnect and US-based Underline, a fiber network operator. Underline, known for its active deployments in Colorado and public rollout in El Paso County, has placed an initial order with InCoax Networks AB for deployment. This collaboration marks a significant milestone for InCoax Networks AB as they enter the US market.

data.title: BIO Asia-Taiwan 2026 to Be Held in Mid-July in Taipei
data.description: Utilizing AI integration to enhance commercialization ventures, the BIO Asia-Taiwan 2026 event, co-hosted by Taiwan Bio Industry Organization (Taiwan BIO) and Biotechnology Innovation Organization, aimed at unlocking opportunities for advancement. Taking place in Taipei on April 16, 2026, the event showcased innovative strategies for utilizing AI in the biotechnology sector.2026.

data.title: Cato suggests US drops crypto capital gains tax to boost competition,  hindering its use as a currency for users in the country.
data.description: A Washington DC-based think tank has contended that cryptocurrency users in the United States must comply with capital gains taxes, which hinder the effectiveness of cryptocurrencies as a form of currency.

data.title: Sigenergy Successfully Listed on HKEX with Strong Backing from Top-Tier Global Investors
data.description: Hong Kong based Sigenergy Technology Co., Ltd. (Stock Code: 06656.HK) achieved a major milestone by listing on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange (HKEX) on April 16, 2026. This move highlights the company's growth and development. Sigenergy is recognized as a pioneer in the "AI+" sector.

data.title: OpenSearch Software Foundation Strengthens Enterprise Readiness With New Long-Term Support Versions
data.description: In Prague on April 16, 2026, during OpenSearchCon Europe, the OpenSearch Software Foundation unveiled a new program featuring defined 18-month support lifecycles, security compliance supported by SBOM, and accredited vendor support. The foundation serves as the unbiased hub for the OpenSearch Project, ensuring that users receive optimal assistance and protection.

data.description: In London on April 16, 2026, reports confirm the inclusion of the "AI Data Center Market – Growth, Share, Opportunities & Competitive Analysis, 2025 – 2035" report in the DC Market Insights portfolio. data.title: Navarre and Hithium sign the investment commitment for their battery plant in a ceremony together with President Sánchez
data.description: María Chivite Navascués, the President of Navarre, along with Jeff Wu, the founder and Chairman of Hithium, have confirmed a significant investment in a key sector amounting to approximately 400 million euros. This investment is projected to generate around 700 job opportunities. The meeting took place in Beijing on April 16, 2026.

data.title: Integrant Awarded Nasdaq Ticker “INGT” Ahead of Highly Anticipated IPO
data.description: A Sydney-based company called Integrant (INGT) has been granted a Nasdaq ticker as it prepares for its initial public offering. The company specializes in using artificial intelligence to enhance regenerative medicine and orthopedic therapies. This development signifies a significant step forward for the company, which is based in Sydney, Australia.
TSMC notes that demand is still rising.

data.title: WLFI token holders may be locked indefinitely under World Liberty's proposal. Justin Sun criticizes plan, early investors face 4-year lockups.
data.description: World Liberty Financial's latest vesting plan has sparked controversy, with Justin Sun labeling it an "absurd governance scam." The plan entails early investors being subjected to 4-year token lockups or potentially indefinite freezes. This move has raised concerns within the community due to its restrictive nature and implications for investors. Justin Sun's criticism adds to the growing scrutiny surrounding the company's approach to governance and investor relations.
